title: narcissus tazetta subsp. pachybolbus
intro: Narcissus tazetta subsp. pachybolbus, a subspecies of the Tazetta narcissus, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues due to its high concentration of volatile oils. The health benefits associated with Narcissus tazetta subsp. pachybolbus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve heart health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of essential oils, teas, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
